Trip at a glance
Dates
Monday July 6 – Friday July 10, 2026
Where
Leavenworth, WA — Cascade Mountains
Hotel
Enzian Inn · Check-in 4pm · Check-out 11am
enzianinn.com ↗
July Weather
Hot & sunny · Highs 73–96°F · Evenings cool to 44–57°F
About Leavenworth
A small Cascade mountain town redesigned in the 1960s as a Bavarian village — German architecture, beer gardens, pretzels, alpine views, and tons of outdoor adventure. About 2.5 hrs from Seattle.

Free Time
Flying in
Fly in on July 6th — ideally earlier in the day to give yourself time for the drive.
Paine Field (PAE) — Everett
Smaller, less crowded · ~2 hr drive to Leavenworth
Seattle-Tacoma (SEA)
More flight options · ~2.5 hr drive to Leavenworth
Driving
From Seattle
~2.5 hours via US-2 over Stevens Pass
From Portland
~3.5 hours via I-84 E and US-97 N
Train — Amtrak Empire Builder
Scenic Cascades ride between Seattle King Street Station and Leavenworth Icicle Station.
Seattle → Leavenworth
DateMonday, July 6
TrainEmpire Builder (Train 8)
Departs Seattle4:55 PM
Arrives Leavenworth8:17 PM
Duration3 hr 22 min
Leavenworth → Seattle
DateFriday, July 10
TrainEmpire Builder (Train 7)
Departs Leavenworth7:18 AM
Arrives Seattle11:29 AM

Shopping — Front Street
Walkable Bavarian shopping strip downtown:
Kris Kringl ↗ Wood Shop ↗ Boulder Bend Glassworks ↗ Pacific Gyotaku ↗ The Culinary Apple ↗ Bushel & Bee Bottle Shop ↗ Krampus Cave ↗ Nutcracker Lady ↗ Mountain Modern Supply Co. ↗ Leavenworth Shirt Co. ↗ The Bubblery ↗ Jubilee ↗ Nutcracker Haus ↗ The Candle Connection ↗ A Book For All Seasons ↗ The Cheesemonger's Shop ↗ The Gingerbread Factory ↗ Das Sweet Shoppe ↗ Ganz Klasse! ↗ Pine Hill Mercantile ↗ JT Blu ↗ Copper Creek ↗ Paprika ↗ Twisted Couture ↗ Simple Treasures ↗ A Matter of Taste ↗ Mint+Sprinkle ↗ Woody's Classic Man ↗ Iron & Velvet ↗ The Plant Ally ↗ Stella's Boutique + Wine Bar ↗ Alpenglö Living ↗ Stitches N' Beads ↗ Copper Creek Kids ↗
Team dinners
Reservations all under Nikki. Together Tue, Wed & Thu evenings.
Breakfast & lunch — your adventure
Choose your own — explore local favorites!
Larch Brunch Co.
Brunch spot
München Haus
Bavarian beer garden · Giant pretzels!
Delic Sushi
Sushi in a Bavarian village — it works!
Lost Pig Cafe
Casual cafe
Bear Bear
Local favorite
Gustav's
Classic Bavarian pub food
Don't miss
Bavarian eateries are everywhere downtown. Grab a giant pretzel from a street vendor and enjoy it in the village square. 🥨
July in Leavenworth is hot and sunny with a lot of walking. Days hit 73–96°F. Evenings cool fast to the 40s–50s — bring a layer!
Clothing
Sun shirt / lightweight top
Breathable, sun-protective — great for hot sunny days
Shorts or light pants
Comfortable for walking around town and trails
Light jacket or fleece
Evenings drop to the 40s–50s — essential after dark
Hiking or walking shoes
Cobblestones + trails — comfortable footwear is a must
Swimwear
Hotel pool, hot tub, river, or Lake Wenatchee
Hat
Wide-brimmed hat or cap — sun protection is serious here
Sun & outdoors
Sunscreen — essential
High altitude + intense sun. Bring plenty & reapply!
Sunglasses
Bright mountain sun and glare
Water bottle
Very dry air — stay hydrated all day
Insect repellent
Helpful near the river and on trails
Don't forget
IDCredit card MedicationsPhone charger Work laptopLaptop charger Band-aidsLip balm MoisturizerPower bank
